title: Code Graph v1
description: Rhizome exports code symbols to Hyphae as a knowledge graph via the hyphae_import_code_graph MCP tool. Producer: rhizome-core/src/graph.rs + hyphae.rs. Consumer: hyphae-mcp/src/tools/memoir.rs.

schema_version.description: Contract version. Receivers should reject unknown versions.

project.description: Project name. Used to create/update memoir named 'code:{project}'.

project_root.description: Canonical filesystem path to the repository root. Part of identity pair — send both project_root and worktree_id, or neither.

worktree_id.description: Git worktree identifier. 'main' for primary, worktree name for linked.

name.description: Symbol name. Must be unique within the project.

source.description: Source node name. Must reference a node in the nodes array.

target.description: Target node name. Must reference a node in the nodes array.

weight.description: Edge weight (0.0-1.0). Default weights: contains=1.0, imports=0.5, implements=0.8, calls=0.3.

prune.description: If true, concepts in the memoir not present in this export are pruned.
